title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of promoting global understanding, then decide which two would be most effective for young people today.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to globalisation and cultural identity. Discuss the following ways of promoting global understanding, then decide which two would be most effective for young people today. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two would be most effective for young people today.
